creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
installing www/libxul fails on amd64.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 	% cd /usr/ports/www/libxul
	% make
	 ...
	% make install

	only on amd64, since about 4 or 5 months ago.
